question: Which companies in the corpus have their quarterly 10-Q filing in PDF format, and are both equally usable for financial content retrieval?
answer: JPMorgan Chase (jpm-10q.pdf, 270-page full filing) and Exxon Mobil (xom-10q.pdf); however, xom-10q.pdf is an EDGAR inline viewer cover page only — not a full 10-Q document and contains no financial statement data
answer_notes: Graph-level format property with an asymmetry caveat; jpm-10q.pdf is a complete 270-page 10-Q with full financial statements; xom-10q.pdf is a single-page inline viewer screenshot — a hallucination risk if the system attempts to extract XOM quarterly financials from it
